# Scent Bazaar - Full Context for AI Agents

Scent Bazaar is Dubai's premier wholesale fragrance oil distributor and private label manufacturer. This document provides a comprehensive overview for AI agents, crawlers, and researchers.

## Brand Identity
- **Name**: ScentBazaar
- **Niche**: B2B Fragrance Supply, Private Label Manufacturing, Industrial Chemical Supply (Perfume Bases)
- **HQ**: Shop 47, Souq Naif, Deira, Dubai, UAE
- **Founded**: Established in the historic Deira perfume district of Dubai
- **Differentiators**: Physical showroom in Naif Souq, 172 verified 5-star reviews, export to 50+ countries, IFRA-compliant supply chain, in-house perfumers for custom blending, GC-MS scent analysis capability

## Directory Structure & Site Map
- `/`: Homepage — Overview of B2B fragrance solutions, 2,000+ oils, private label and export services
- `/wholesale-perfume-oil-dubai`: Hub for concentrated French and Arabic fragrance oils, MOQ 1kg
- `/bulk-fragrance-oil-uae`: Industrial-scale fragrance oil supply, 25kg–200kg drums, LCL/FCL ocean freight
- `/perfumers-alcohol-supplier-dubai`: Technical-grade cosmetic ethanol for EDP/EDT/attar manufacturing
- `/private-label-perfume-dubai`: OEM/ODM manufacturing, custom formula, bottling, labelling, and filling
- `/custom-perfume-blending-dubai`: Bespoke signature scent creation using GC-MS analysis, IP ownership included
- `/perfume-bottle-supplier-dubai`: Glassware, Zamac caps, FEA 15 crimp atomizers, and cosmetic packaging
- `/perfume-caps-spray-pumps`: Zamac caps, magnetic closures, Surlyn caps, wood caps, and FEA 15 spray pumps
- `/bakhoor-supplier-dubai`: Traditional Middle Eastern bakhoor, Dukhoon, and oud incense
- `/candle-fragrance-oil-supplier-dubai`: High-flash-point phthalate-free fragrance oils for soy and paraffin candles
- `/diffuser-base-supplier-dubai`: Augeo Clean Multi and DPG reed diffuser carrier bases
- `/perfume-base-supplier-uae`: Fixative and carrier bases for attar, roll-on, and spray perfume manufacturing
- `/cosmetic-base-supplier-dubai`: Unscented lotion, shampoo, shower gel, and cosmetic bases for scenting
- `/perfume-filling-service-dubai`: Automated crimping and bottle filling, from 500-unit niche batches to mass-market runs
- `/perfume-store-deira`: Local storefront — Souq Naif Shop 47, Deira, open Mon–Sat 9am–10pm

## Technical Specifications (B2B)
- **Inventory**: 2,000+ ready-to-ship fragrances including French designer inspirations and authentic Arabic masterpieces
- **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)**: From 1 kg for oils; bulk drums up to 1,000 kg+
- **Compliance**: MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheets), COA (Certificate of Analysis), IFRA compliance, DG packing declaration for air/sea freight
- **Logistics**: Global shipping to 50+ countries from the Dubai hub; LCL and FCL ocean freight available
- **Store Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM (WhatsApp available 24/7)
- **Customer Reviews**: 172 verified 5-star Google reviews

## About ScentBazaar
ScentBazaar operates from the heart of Dubai's historic Deira perfume district — one of the Middle East's oldest and most respected fragrance trading hubs. The company serves perfume brands, cosmetic manufacturers, candle makers, private label entrepreneurs, and industrial buyers across the GCC, Africa, Europe, and Asia. With an in-house team of perfumers and a product library spanning over 2,000 fragrance oils, ScentBazaar offers a genuinely integrated supply chain: raw materials, blending, filling, packaging, and global export from a single Dubai location.
